---
title: "P: Antiparasitic products, insecticides and repellents"
date: "2026-02-08"
---

| Level 2 code | Description |
| ---: | :--- |
| P01 | Antiprotozoals |
| P02 | Anthelmintics |
| P03 | Ectoparasiticides, incl. scabicides, insecticides and repellents |

: ATC P level 2 codes {#tbl-atc-p-lvl-2 tbl-colwidths="[20, 80]"}
